Tabletop Hustle Ring

Once in a while, casts withering on a random enemy and all enemies in a small area around them. It removes a random buff from those units, reducing their damage by 50% and health by 25% for 5 sec. Additionally, these enemies take 150000 pure damage.

Requirements: 98-100
